caption: A screen recording shows a website titled "RANDOM.ORG" and "True Random Number Service," featuring a "List Randomizer" tool. A text box under "Part 1: Enter List Items" contains a list of names and phrases, including "Paul Jon McNealby," "Chris Maxwell," and "(you're viewing this form in secretly)." Below the list, "Part 2: Go!" is displayed with a "Randomize" button, a "Reset Form" button, and a "Switch to Advanced Mode" link. A red YouTube subscription banner is visible on the right, stating "Hit the SUBSCRIBE button down below!" with a "Subscribe" button. In the bottom right corner, a small inset video shows a man with a beard and glasses wearing a black t-shirt. As the video progresses, the man speaks and gestures, while the screen remains on the website. The footer contains copyright information and links to social media.
